headline: Bitcoin Slumps Below $62,500 Amid Iran Tensions

article.title: Bitcoin price sags under $62.5K as Iran strikes add to US stocks pressure
article.summary: Bitcoin saw a key rejection at local highs before reversing lower, moving with stocks for a second day as US-Iran war downside took its toll.

headline: HSBC Enters UK Digital Securities Sandbox Programme

article.title: HSBC wins Bank of England approval to enter Digital Securities Sandbox
article.summary: The Bank of England approved HSBC Orion to go live in its Digital Securities Sandbox, with the first Digital Gilt Instrument transaction expected in the first quarter of 2027.

headline: Sweetgreen Stock Recovers 26% Amid Contamination Fears

article.title: Sweetgreen Pares 26% Drop as Parasite Tied to Taco Bell Lettuce
article.summary: Sweetgreen Inc. shares surged on Friday, halting a four-day skid, after US regulators said a parasite outbreak that’s sickened thousands across several states was traced to shredded iceberg lettuce served at Taco Bell restaurants.

headline: Foundever Cuts $500M Debt in Creditor Pact

article.title: Foundever Strikes Deal With Creditors to Cut Debt Load
article.summary: Troubled business services giant Foundever Group has reached an agreement with a group of creditors to reduce its multi-billion dollar debt load, with the company’s controlling shareholder injecting fresh funds and installing new management.

headline: $5.3M Crypto Scam Lands 3 in UK Jail

article.title: Three Men Jailed for Posing as Police in $5.3M UK Crypto Fraud
